content: I'd just make sure you always keep enough banked for the next month's dupe items. Income will slow down a bit as you catch up on the story and get less standard pulls.

Please be sure to check out our <#1304022827824844842>  section! Here are a few resources, tips, and walkthroughs to help you master the game:

## General Guide
- [Game Mechanics](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1417994340177022981) by Mythag University
- [Store Guide](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1442292634575175710) by Mythag University 
- [Morimens New Players Handbook](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1477730088299663431) by Cheri
- [Compilation of guide videos](<https://docs.google.com/document/d/1bnnR--yNl6r5cMljPoEF4bXC9HIoSK_WNUG7ucYGO6A/edit?usp=sharing>) by Kaly

## Mode Specific
- [P-Dive Shortest Map Analysis](<https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1483756178340315216>) by Aurora

## Compendium
- [Morimens Compendium](<https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1TCU7LJRzqKeuvLe97y_TfGZ-j6jq5bZX6hskAAJ2mFQ/edit?gid=167686509#gid=167686509>) by Mythag University
- [Boss Compendium](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1489244885025292328) by Mythag University
Generally poison comps need Xu
Especially for story
Oh you have xu
You can do karen
Or lilly
Lilly is a defensive unit
Or faint

Poison comps generally need Xu to function well. Issues with poison team is that you generally need to stall for poison damage to trigger so you'll need

Weakness
Shields
Poison trigger

Nymph isnt enough to solo carry a poison team

Put R wheels on your units. 

Whisper
Aged
Gluttony

Assuming we run gelot horla thais and aigis
Run lone posse
Covs are april and wheels are titans blade and hand of oblivion, if u have +12 titans and u have whale run that
Thais is ur keyflare/baby bot
The rest just stack keyflare/dr
Horla anger stance
Aigis stun/if u have oe for bonus damage
Lone posse flails
Make as many flails as u can
Burst in one round with thais and gelot exalt
Remember to apply weakness and vulnerability
